rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(118, 96, 138), rgb(161, 142, 179)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(67, 45, 87), rgb(203, 185, 221));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 184px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 413px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 299px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- set WorkRequest status to SCHEDULING
- load results from Cache for Model
- if all results returned from cache:
- upload result to S3
- set work request status to COMPLETED
- else, request a new ModelInstance
- if success, set status to PROCESSING
- else, set status back to QUEUED

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 299px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- check state of work request
- if possibly failed, move back to QUEUED
- if in-progress, move to PROCESSING

div.div:
- check state of work request
- if job processing completed, process result
based on status (COMPLETED / FAILED)

div.div:
- get processed results from Job
- merge with any cached results
- upload full results to s3
- if cache opt-in, cache new results
- set WorkRequest status to COMPLETED

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 465px; margin-left: 677px;

div.div:
- set error details on the WorkRequest
- set WorkRequest status to FAILED
